skills.name: blog-markdown
skills.description: Fetch blog posts from mhrsntrk.com as clean, attribution-tagged markdown. Use when you need the content of a post on self-sovereign identity, eIDAS, decentralized identity, homelab, or engineering topics by Mahir Senturk.

skills.name: site-overview
skills.description: Get a structured, LLM-friendly overview of mhrsntrk.com — who Mahir Senturk is, what the site contains, and which machine-readable endpoints exist. Use as the entry point before deeper crawling.
